reviews.comment:
Inoperantes y mal educados.

Fui el sábado 27/2/21 creo, tipo 10 de la mañana.
Había 3 playeros, cola de autos. Yo en moto, espero que carguen dos autos adelante mío. Cuando llega mi turno me ignoran por completo. Por otra parte una playera estaba llenando el tanque de un auto, pero espero toda la carga, por ende 10 minutos parada al lado de ese auto. Atendieron los autos de los laterales míos que llegaron después que yo.
Por tanta inoperancia dos autos se fueron por la demora.
Pasa la encargada una persona excedida de peso, desagradable y de malos modales. Le pregunto porque no me atienden y me refiere después de 10 minutos de demora que me faltaba el chaleco reflectivo.

Inoperantes y mal educados, ojalá alguien tome cartas en el asunto.

(Translated by Google)
Incompetent and rude.

I went on Saturday, February 27, 2021, I think, around 10 a.m.
There were three beach attendants, a line of cars. I was on a motorcycle, waiting for two cars ahead of me to load. When my turn came, they completely ignored me. Another beach attendant was filling up a car's tank, but I waited for the entire load, so I stood next to that car for 10 minutes. They served the cars next to me that arrived after me.
Due to such incompetence, two cars left due to the delay.
The attendant passed by, an overweight, unpleasant, and rude person. I asked her why they weren't serving me, and after a 10-minute delay, she told me that I was missing my reflective vest.

Incompetent and rude. I hope someone takes action on this matter.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5eWZYd293RRAB
